data.influence_score_rationale: Subject scores 2 points for low LinkedIn follower count (defaulting to <500 category), 2 points for entry-level career seniority as a Trainee, and 3 points for single-platform existence. No posting activity or external web presence detected.
data.data_confidence_rationale: Data derived from a single active LinkedIn profile; no external presence or social media activity on other platforms detected.
